extract: Florges (Japanese: フラージェス Florges) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Floette when exposed to a Shiny Stone. It is the final form of Flabébé. Florges also has five separate forms, each named for the color of its flower: Red Flower, Yellow Flower, Orange Flower, Blue Flower, and White Flower.
